name: Mint Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh mint leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mint leaves, corn syrup, and vinegar in a small saucepan.
2. In another small bowl, combine the cornstarch and water until blended.
3. Add the cornstarch mixture to the mint mixture.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
5. Strain the sauce if desired.
